title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A planned fight at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in a mass shooting, leaving two people dead and several others wounded.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its devastating impact on community spaces and public safety.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14, 2026, at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Promotes advancements in polymer technology and provides educational opportunities for industry professionals.

title: Teenager Accused of Killing Parents and Grandmother
summary: A 16-year-old girl is accused of murdering her parents and grandmother, according to the NC sheriff's office.
charlotte_impact: A tragic case highlighting potential mental health issues and the devastating consequences of family violence.

title: Charlotte Mayor Vi Lyles Announces Resignation
summary: Charlotte, N.C. Mayor Vi Lyles has announced that she will resign in May, creating a vacancy in city leadership.
charlotte_impact: Signals a significant shift in Charlotte's political landscape and necessitates a search for a new leader.

title: Woman Raped at Vape Shop in North Charlotte, Suspect Arrested
summary: A woman was raped at a vape shop in north Charlotte, and a suspect has been arrested in connection with the crime.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about safety in commercial areas and the importance of swift law enforcement action.

title: Council Member Suggests Outsider to Replace Mayor Lyles
summary: A Charlotte council member suggests appointing an outsider to replace Mayor Lyles, sparking debate over the succession process.
charlotte_impact: Influences the discussion around the selection process for the new mayor and potential changes in city governance.

title: Charlotte Sees Rain, Drought Persists
summary: Charlotte has experienced the most rain in months, but drought conditions continue to persist in the region.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing environmental challenges and the need for water conservation efforts.

title: Viral Charlotte Billboard Image Deemed Fake
summary: A viral billboard image circulating in Charlotte has been confirmed as fake, with no evidence of its existence.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the spread of misinformation and the importance of verifying information before sharing it.

title: Deadly Crash on I-85 South Under Investigation
summary: A deadly crash occurred on I-85 South in Charlotte, and authorities are currently investigating the circumstances.
charlotte_impact: Impacts traffic and raises concerns about road safety and the factors contributing to accidents.

title: Water Leak Near School Unfixed for a Year
summary: Charlotte Water allowed a leak near a school to remain unfixed for almost a full year, raising concerns about water waste.
charlotte_impact: Highlights infrastructure maintenance issues and the potential impact on water resources during a drought.

title: Former Mayor Foxx Urges Rethink of I-77 Toll Expansion
summary: Former Charlotte Mayor Foxx urges leaders to reconsider the impact of the I-77 toll expansion on Black neighborhoods.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about equity and the potential displacement of communities due to infrastructure projects.

title: Man Convicted in Brooks Sandwich House Shooting Linked to More Murders
summary: A man tied to the deadly Brooks Sandwich House shooting has been convicted in three more murders, revealing a pattern of violence.
charlotte_impact: Underscores the severity of violent crime and the importance of holding perpetrators accountable.

title: Charlotte City Council to Hold Special Meeting on May 11
summary: The Charlotte City Council will hold a special meeting on May 11 to discuss important city matters.
charlotte_impact: Provides insight into upcoming decisions and policy discussions affecting the city.

title: Charlotte Mayor Vi Lyles Resigns After 9 Years
summary: Charlotte Mayor Vi Lyles resigns after 9 years in office, marking the end of an era in city leadership.
charlotte_impact: Reflects on the mayor's tenure and the impact of her leadership on the city's development.

title: Akshay Bhatia's Charlotte Homecoming
summary: Akshay Bhatia experiences a warm welcome during his round in Charlotte, making it a special homecoming.
charlotte_impact: Showcases local support for athletes and the positive impact of sports on community spirit.
